attr.title: Elasto Mania
attr.desc: Physics-based motorbike game from 2000 by Balazs Rozsa. Ride through hand-crafted levels, collect apples, and reach the flower to complete each stage. Built on neri-rnd's elma-miyoo SDL2 reimplementation of the original engine. Bundles community-curated levels (Top10 picks, full official packs from 2000-2002, and reviewed showcase levels) plus the matching custom LGR graphics packs.
attr.inst: Copy your Elma.res and Default.lgr from a legitimate Elasto Mania installation (Classic 2000, Steam Remastered or GOG Remastered) into elastomania/gamefiles/. On first launch a button-layout selector appears; pick a preset or run the Custom Layout wizard.
